name: The corruption of the not so innocent saint: My bestfriend will teach me how to have sex using my crush as an example!
description:
"......"

After landing a group project with your pervert friend (Yorirata Isotaka), the gyaru, and the innocent saint (Masachima Hino), the gyaru (Hiroda Tomogi) insisted on checking if the pervert really had a real onahole at his place. Things escalated quickly, and soon the two were caught up in intense sex. Now, post-climax, the pervert friend turned to the flushed innocent saint and invited her to join him for more. Meanwhile, the gyaru locked eyes with you, smirking: she wanted you next.
creator: The_Plagiarist
